features: YOUR FAVORITE LUBE IN UPDATED PACKAGING: Redesigned, fresh enhanced packaging, however, don’t worry, your favourite lube inside the bottle is still exactly the same
DUREX MASSAGE LUBE YLANG YLANG FOR SOFT SENSUAL STIMULATION: A ylang ylang-infused 2 in 1 massage gel and sexual lube for intimate exploration
GENTLE WATER-SOLUBLE FORMULA: Durex massage lube is a gentle water-soluble formula that won’t stain and washes off with ease when you’re done
SUITABLE FOR ALL KINDS OF SEX: You can use Durex massage ylang ylang all over, including intimate areas, as a lube for arousing foreplay, anal, oral and vaginal sex
CONDOM-COMPATIBLE: Suitable for use with condoms, all areas of the body and all kinds of sexual experience
description: Product Description Durex Massage Lube Ylang Ylang is made for intimate initiation. With the arousing fragrance of Ylang Ylang, our sensual massage gel is soft, smooth and silky and gentle enough to be used all over the body, including your most intimate areas. A silky-smooth, arousing and aromatic touch for your foreplay, anal, oral and vaginal sex. There are few things in life more relaxing than a long, slow sensual massage. And, with Durex Massage 2 in 1 water-based Lube, that can soon turn into something more intimate. It’s good to be in the know, so make sure to read the included instructions completely. Ingredients Aux Extraits Directions 1. Apply a few drops of the lube to the desired area. 2. Massage the area for smooth pleasure. Safety Warning Avoid eye contact. If irritation occurs, stop use immediately. See more
